de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class ExecutionBlockContract

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionNode<SourceElement>
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.ExecutionBlockContract
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionBlockContract, IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>

    public class ExecutionBlockContract
extends AbstractExecutionNode<SourceElement>
implements IExecutionBlockContract
    The default implementation of IExecutionBlockContract.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

      • declaredVariableAsTerm

        protected Term declaredVariableAsTerm(StatementBlock sb,
                          int statementIndex)
        Returns the variable declared by the statement at the given index as Term.
        Parameters:
        sb - The StatementBlock which contains all variable declarations.
        statementIndex - The index in the StatementBlock with the variable declaration of interest.
        Returns:
        The variable as Term.

      • collectRemembranceVariables

        protected void collectRemembranceVariables(Term term,
                               Map<LocationVariable,Term> remembranceHeaps,
                               Map<LocationVariable,Term> remembranceLocalVariables)
        Collects recursive all remembrance variables.
        Parameters:
        term - The Term to start collecting.
        remembranceHeaps - The Map to fill.
        remembranceLocalVariables - The Map to fill.

        public boolean isPreconditionComplied()
        Checks if the precondition is complied.

        Returns:
